scope: Extend Studio Room owner lifecycle Playwright smoke to Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit

playwrightProjects.name: firefox
playwrightProjects.environmentNote: Initial run failed because the local Playwright Firefox binary was missing; npx playwright install firefox webkit installed it.

playwrightProjects.name: webkit
playwrightProjects.environmentNote: WebKit binary installed with npx playwright install firefox webkit before execution.
